title: Austrobassia stelligera
intro: Austrobassia stelligera, also known as the Australian prickly pear cactus, is a type of succulent plant native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Austrobassia stelligera include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other inflammatory disorders.

Austrobassia stelligera is also referred to as the star-leaved wattle, a name that suggests its distinctive foliage.
